verse_text: 'I am the good shepherd. The good shepherd gives His life for the sheep.

pericope.title: Jesus Gives His Life for the Sheep

links.context: Shepherds are chosen to hear the first announcement of the Nativity, as they are symbols of Christ the Good Shepherd ([[JOH.10:11]]). Unlike the Pharisees, the shepherds were without guile and had simple faith.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
